content.title: Patios - Concrete
content.subtitle: Turn your backyard into the ultimate gathering space with a custom concrete patio. Built with 6.5-bag concrete, fiber reinforcement, and wire mesh for lasting durability, beauty, and value.

content.title: A Patio That Redefines
content.subtitle: A patio can be the crown jewel of your backyard — a place where design meets comfort, and every gathering feels effortless. But let’s face it: most standard patios fall short. Cracked slabs, faded colors, and uneven finishes often steal the spotlight, leaving your dream of an elegant outdoor retreat
content.paragraph1: At Maxima Concrete, we don’t just pour slabs — we craft outdoor living experiences. Our team collaborates with you from design to installation, creating a patio that reflects your unique personality, lifestyle, and aesthetic vision. Using premium materials, modern techniques, and expert craftsmanship, we turn your outdoor space into a lasting expression of home.

content.title:
Why Maxima Is the Right 
Choice for Your Patio

items.text: Concrete is remarkably strong, resisting time, weather, and wear — a long-term investment for your property.
items.label: High-Strength Mix (6.5-Bag Concrete):

items.text: No rot, no fading, no hassle. A simple clean and occasional seal keep your patio looking brand new.
items.label: Crack Resistance:

items.text: Choose from multiple textures, colors, and finishes to fit your outdoor design perfectly.
items.label: Style:

items.text: A well-crafted patio enhances both your home’s appeal and resale value.

content.description: Our patios combine strength, style, and simplicity. Whether you envision a sleek modern retreat or a warm rustic escape, we’ll bring it to life — built for beauty and made to last.

content.title: Concrete Patio Finish Options

styles.title: Broom-Finish
styles.description: Classic slip-resistant texture with clean lines, offering all-season traction and timeless appeal.

styles.title: Stamped & Colored
styles.description: Decorative patterns and rich colors that mimic natural stone or brick, creating a distinctive look with enhanced curb appeal.

styles.title: Exposed Aggregate & Buff Wash
styles.description: A warm, natural finish that reveals exposed stone textures, adding depth, character, and a refined look to any concrete surface.

styles.title: Paver, Brick or Natural Stone
styles.description: Enhance your concrete design with paver, brick, or natural stone accents that add texture, character, and timeless appeal.

content.description: Maxima Concrete offers a diverse range of finishes and textures to match your home’s architecture and your personal taste:

content.title:
Paver Patios That Bring 
Your Backyard to Life
content.description:
A paver patio isn’t just a surface — it’s the heart of your outdoor living space. At Maxima Concrete, we combine artistry and engineering to design patios that blend natural beauty with long-lasting strength.

Our team uses premium paver materials in earthy tones, warm reds, or modern grays — creating elegant layouts that reflect your home’s character while withstanding Central Ohio’s seasons. Whether you want a cozy circular firepit area or a large entertaining zone, we’ll bring your vision to life with precision and care.

content.title:
Our Commitment
to Quality

benefits.title: 6.5-Bag Mix Concrete
benefits.description: Stronger and denser for a durable foundation.

benefits.title: Fiber Mesh Reinforcement
benefits.description: Reduces cracking and adds internal strength.

benefits.title: 10-Gauge Wire Mesh
benefits.description: Provides superior stability and long-term support.

benefits.title: Full-Service Experience
benefits.description: From consultation to final finish — we handle it all.

content.description:
We build every project with precision 
and care — ensuring structural integrity and beauty that lasts.

When you choose Maxima Concrete, you’re choosing reliability, craftsmanship, and peace of mind.

items.question: How long does a concrete patio last?
items.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, a Maxima Concrete patio can last 30 years or more.

items.question: Can I customize the color and texture?
items.answer: Absolutely. We offer stamped, colored, broom-finished, and exposed aggregate options to match your home and style.

items.question: How soon can I use my patio after installation?
items.answer: Foot traffic is usually fine after 24–48 hours, with full cure in about a week before heavy use.

items.question: Do you offer free consultations?
items.answer: Yes — we provide free on-site consultations and design estimates anywhere in Central Ohio.
